div.p: type InFlightMessage struct { MsgID uint64 Payload []byte ConsumerID string DeliveredAt time.Time VisibleAfter time.Time // DeliveredAt + VisibilityTimeout Partition int }

Retry Logic (HandleNack) go retry_count[msgID]++ retries := retry_count[msgID] if retries >= MaxRetries { dlqManager.MoveToDLQ(topic, msgID, payload, retries, reason) return } // Re-queue for redelivery pending.Add(msg)
